mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallpaper_asset (owner_username, title, description, type, status, original_url, thumb_320_url, thumb_720_url, thumb_1280_url, width, height, file_size, tags_text, copyright_declared, copyright_info, rating_avg, rating_count, download_count, apply_count, current_version, deleted, created_at, updated_at, published_at) VALUES (#{ownerUsername}, #{title}, #{description}, #{type}, #{status}, #{originalUrl}, #{thumb320Url}, #{thumb720Url}, #{thumb1280Url}, #{width}, #{height}, #{fileSize}, #{tagsText}, #{copyrightDeclared}, #{copyrightInfo}, #{ratingAvg}, #{ratingCount}, #{downloadCount}, #{applyCount}, #{currentVersion}, #{deleted}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{publishedAt})

INSERT INTO wallpaper_version (wallpaper_id, version_no, original_url, thumb_320_url, thumb_720_url, thumb_1280_url, file_size, width, height, operator_name, reason, created_at) VALUES (#{wallpaperId}, #{versionNo}, #{originalUrl}, #{thumb320Url}, #{thumb720Url}, #{thumb1280Url}, #{fileSize}, #{width}, #{height}, #{operatorName}, #{reason}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO wallpaper_video_meta (wallpaper_id, duration_ms, frame_rate, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{wallpaperId}, #{durationMs}, #{frameRate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE duration_ms = VALUES(duration_ms), frame_rate = VALUES(frame_rate), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT original_url AS originalUrl, thumb_320_url AS thumb320Url, thumb_720_url AS thumb720Url, thumb_1280_url AS thumb1280Url FROM wallpaper_version WHERE wallpaper_id = #{wallpaperId}

SELECT wa.id, wa.owner_username AS ownerUsername, ua.avatar AS ownerAvatar, wa.title, wa.description, wa.type, wa.status, wa.original_url AS originalUrl, wa.thumb_320_url AS thumb320Url, wa.thumb_720_url AS thumb720Url, wa.thumb_1280_url AS thumb1280Url, wa.width, wa.height, vm.duration_ms AS durationMs, vm.frame_rate AS frameRate, wa.file_size AS fileSize, wa.tags_text AS tagsText, wa.copyright_declared AS copyrightDeclared, wa.copyright_info AS copyrightInfo, wa.rating_avg AS ratingAvg, wa.rating_count AS ratingCount, wa.download_count AS downloadCount, wa.apply_count AS applyCount, wa.current_version AS currentVersion, wa.deleted, wa.created_at AS createdAt, wa.updated_at AS updatedAt, wa.published_at AS publishedAt FROM wallpaper_asset wa LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON ua.username = wa.owner_username LEFT JOIN wallpaper_video_meta vm ON vm.wallpaper_id = wa.id WHERE wa.id = #{id} AND wa.deleted = 0
SELECT id FROM wallpaper_asset WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE wallpaper_asset SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, type = #{type}, tags_text = #{tagsText}, copyright_info = #{copyrightInfo}, status = 'pending', updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND owner_username = #{ownerUsername} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE wallpaper_asset SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, type = #{type}, tags_text = #{tagsText}, copyright_info = #{copyrightInfo}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, published_at = #{publishedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE wallpaper_asset SET original_url = #{originalUrl}, thumb_320_url = #{thumb320Url}, thumb_720_url = #{thumb720Url}, thumb_1280_url = #{thumb1280Url}, file_size = #{fileSize}, width = #{width}, height = #{height}, current_version = current_version + 1, status = 'pending', updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND owner_username = #{ownerUsername} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE wallpaper_asset SET apply_count = apply_count + 1, download_count = download_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'published'
UPDATE wallpaper_asset SET download_count = download_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'published'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallpaper_apply_log (wallpaper_id, username, ip_hash, user_agent, action, created_at) VALUES (#{wallpaperId}, #{username}, #{ipHash}, #{userAgent}, #{action}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO wallpaper_rating (wallpaper_id, username, score, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{wallpaperId}, #{username}, #{score}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE score = VALUES(score), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.update: UPDATE wallpaper_asset wa LEFT JOIN ( SELECT wallpaper_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(score), 2) AS avg_score FROM wallpaper_rating WHERE wallpaper_id = #{wallpaperId} GROUP BY wallpaper_id ) wr ON wa.id = wr.wallpaper_id SET wa.rating_count = COALESCE(wr.cnt, 0), wa.rating_avg = COALESCE(wr.avg_score, 0), wa.updated_at = NOW() WHERE wa.id = #{wallpaperId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallpaper_report (wallpaper_id, reporter_username, reason_type, reason_detail, status, created_at) VALUES (#{wallpaperId}, #{reporterUsername}, #{reasonType}, #{reasonDetail}, 'pending', #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, wallpaper_id AS wallpaperId, username, score, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM wallpaper_rating WHERE wallpaper_id = #{wallpaperId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallpaper_review_log (wallpaper_id, action, reviewer_name, reviewer_reason, created_at) VALUES (#{wallpaperId}, #{action}, #{reviewerName}, #{reviewerReason}, #{createdAt})
